headline: Taking A Fresh Look At Southern (SO) Valuation After Georgia Power’s Largest Distributed Solar Commitment
summary: Georgia Power, part of Southern (SO), has secured regulatory approval for 16 distributed generation solar power purchase agreements totaling 70 MW. This represents the largest such commitment in the utility’s history and a clear signal on renewables. See our latest analysis for Southern. Recent news has landed against a backdrop of mixed momentum, with the share price at US$95.42 and a 90 day share price return of 9.46% alongside a 5 year total shareholder return of 84.47%. This suggests that...

headline: FUTY Delivers 64% in Five Years While Charging Investors Next to Nothing
summary: Utilities have long been the portfolio’s boring backbone: predictable dividends, regulated cash flows, and a tendency to hold up when riskier assets sell off. Fidelity MSCI Utilities Index ETF (NYSEARCA:FUTY) packages that idea into a single fund at near-zero cost, but what investors actually own is more nuanced than the classic defensive utility story. What ... FUTY Delivers 64% in Five Years While Charging Investors Next to Nothing

headline: Southern Company Risk Looks Overdone as Policy Fears Fade
summary: Mizuho is pushing back on what it sees as an overstated threat to Southern Company (NYSE:SO), maintaining its Outperform rating after conversations with parties in Alabama suggested the state’s competing utility legislation is unlikely to produce meaningful regulatory damage. Alabama bills SB 360 and HB 475 have raised concerns about the regulatory framework governing Southern ... Southern Company Risk Looks Overdone as Policy Fears Fade
